service_area: Canada's Mobile Flooring Experts. Free In-Home Estimates, Samples & Installation
seo_title: Floors Today | Flooring Installation in Ontario
seo_description: Shop premium hardwood, laminate, vinyl and carpet flooring with free in-home estimates and professional installation across Ontario.
seo_og_title: In home Estimate | Premium Flooring in Ontario | floorstoday.ca
seo_og_description: Free in-home flooring estimates, transparent pricing and professional installation across Ontario.
hero_text: All-inclusive pricing with no hidden fees. Get a complete quote during your free in-home consultation.
form_subtitle: Quick and easy. No obligation. Takes less than 1 minute.
process_title: How Our Flooring Installation Process Works
process_text: Getting new floors should be simple. That's why we bring the showroom to you, provide a clear quote, and handle everything from start to finish.
comparison_title: All inclusive*. No Surprises. No Hidden Fees.
comparison_text: At Floors Today, we're committed to helping homeowners get beautiful new floors at the best possible value. From exclusive promotions and seasonal sales to installation specials and price-match opportunities, we make it easier to save without compromising on quality.
comparison_disclaimer: All-inclusive pricing does not include unforeseen subfloor preparation or repairs that may only become visible after the existing flooring has been removed. Any additional work will require your approval before proceeding.
cta_title: Ready to Transform Your Home with New Flooring?
cta_subtitle: Schedule a Free In-Home Flooring Estimate
cta_text: Our flooring experts bring hardwood, vinyl, laminate, engineered hardwood, and carpet samples directly to your home. We'll measure your space, answer your questions, and provide a complete all-inclusive estimate before any work begins.
category_text: Shop with confidence knowing you're getting exceptional value. If you receive a lower written quote on a comparable flooring product and installation package, we'll review it and do our best to beat the price. That's our commitment to helping homeowners get beautiful new floors at the best possible price.
guarantee_title: Lowest Price Guarantee on Flooring & Installation
guarantee_subtitle: We'll Beat Any Comparable Written Quote
guarantee_text: If you find a lower price on a comparable flooring product and professional installation package, we'll do our best to beat it. Our goal is simple: deliver exceptional flooring, expert installation, and unbeatable value for homeowners across the GTA.
deals_badge: Save big on select flooring products and installation services for a limited time.
deals_text: Save big on select flooring products and installation services for a limited time.
deals_body: At Floors Today, we believe quality flooring should be affordable and stress-free. That's why we offer exclusive promotions, financing options, installation specials, and price-match programs to help homeowners get the floors they love while staying within budget.
deals_includes:
Free In-Home Estimate
Samples Brought to Your Home
Professional Installation
All-Inclusive Pricing
deals_popup_title: Up to 50% Off Hardwood, Engineered Hardwood, Vinyl, Laminate & Carpet Flooring
deals_popup_intro: Choose your floors at home, receive transparent project pricing, and arrange professional installation.
deals_popup_steps:
Free home estimate|Book online or call {phone}.
Shop from home|Compare samples and receive your project estimate on site.
Eligible savings|Save up to 60% on select installed flooring styles.
Professional finish|Your flooring is installed by qualified professionals.
deals_popup_terms: Offer Details: Receive up to 50% off select Hardwood, Engineered Hardwood, Vinyl, Laminate, and Carpet flooring, based on product selection and project size. Discount applies to select styles only. Basic installation, standard underlayment or padding (where applicable), and standard installation materials are included where specified. Excludes premium upgrades, stairs, subfloor repairs, specialty removal or preparation, non-standard furniture moving, custom work, miscellaneous charges, and previous purchases. Valid for residential installations only, while supplies last. Offer ends August 31, 2026, and may be modified or withdrawn without notice.
deals_popup_terms_extra: Installation is scheduled based on product availability, service area, and installer availability. Our team will coordinate the earliest convenient installation date and keep you informed throughout the process.
testimonials_text: Join thousands of satisfied Ontario homeowners who trust Floors Today for their flooring needs
newsletter_text: Join our newsletter for exclusive flooring offers, project tips, and your $300* Coupon details. Condition Applies
newsletter_details_text:
$300* discount applies to qualifying purchases of $3,000 or more. Offer available to new email subscribers only. Limit one offer per household. Cannot be combined with certain promotions or previous purchases. Additional exclusions may apply.

By clicking "Get My $300* Off", you agree to receive marketing emails from Flooring Liquidators. You may unsubscribe at any time using the link in our emails. Your information will be handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions.
warranty_details_content:
At Floors Today, we stand behind both our flooring products and professional installation. Your purchase is backed by a 3-Year Limited Warranty covering manufacturing defects and installation workmanship under normal residential use. Warranty coverage requires proper care and maintenance and does not cover normal wear and tear, accidental damage, moisture-related issues, misuse, or damage caused by improper maintenance.

View our full Warranty Terms & Conditions for complete coverage details.
footer_about: We believe in transparent pricing. That's why our all-inclusive estimates include every essential detail in delivering a seamless flooring experience with no unexpected costs.
footer_copyright: Floors Today Copyright {year} All Rights Reserved

process_steps.title: Free In-Home Consultation
process_steps.description: Our flooring specialist will visit your home with samples, answer your questions, and help you find the perfect floor for your style, budget, and lifestyle.
process_steps.button: Don't Miss Out on Up to 50% Off

process_steps.title: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
process_steps.description: We'll measure your space and provide a detailed quote that includes everything upfront. No hidden fees, no unexpected cost, just clear pricing you can trust.

process_steps.title: Professional Installation
process_steps.description: Once you're ready, we'll schedule your installation at a time that works for you. Our experienced installers will ensure your new floors look beautiful and are built to last.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: The team at Floors Today was incredible. From the initial consultation to the final installation, everything was seamless. Our new hardwood floors look absolutely stunning!

testimonials.name: Michael R.
testimonials.text: I was worried about hidden fees after bad experiences elsewhere, but Floors Today delivered exactly what they promised. The all-inclusive pricing is the real deal.

testimonials.name: Jennifer L.
testimonials.text: Best decision we made for our home renovation. The vinyl flooring is perfect for our busy family with kids and pets. Highly recommend their professional installation.
